parameters.query:
INSERT INTO news_items (fingerprint, source_name, article_url, language, headline, dek, body, published_date, topics, scraped_at)
VALUES ('{{$json.fingerprint}}', $1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $9)
ON CONFLICT (fingerprint) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id;

nodes.name: Postgres: dedupe insert (optional)
nodes.notes: Enable after creating news_items table (see n8n/README.md).
